statement: In every magma, Equation 2221 (`x = ((y * z) * w) * (y * u)`) implies Equation 883 (`x = y * ((x * y) * (y * y))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0436
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op (op y z) w) (op y u))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op (op x y) (op y y)))
